reviews.review_description: Is there a way to move the sphere (with the disc) out of my way...like to lower or to the side? It's way too much where my arm hand goes through for the throw... very uncomfortable placement and sometimes the disc even does this weird bounce  off it? please let me know since seems like a fun game...but the sphere placement is very distracting and I cant see any controls settings menu to be able to move it. Not sure why you placed it right in front of players chest ;)

It's really 4 stars but I wanted to balance out some of the unfair reviews.  This game is pretty fun. The environments are relaxing and diverse which is what makes disc golf games fun in VR.
The graphics aren't great though so a point off for that.  Not bad but could be better.  The levels are pretty big though.
Gameplay is casual similar to something like Angry Birds VR where you go for 3 stars.  There's a bunch of levels.  Physics are good enough.  If I miss a throw it always feels like it was my fault and not the game.

Apparently , if you wanted a disc golf or something and play this u need to commit siucide and make sure somebody spills gasoline on you and light it, or else you will be lost in neernity of despair.


But th egme is fine,  very beautiful graphics, just love them, simple gamplay and good soft warm up fo me, and quite different from other warm ups i use

Maybe its a bit less than 5 star
Its not in death unchained, untill you pfall, crashland

 but all those low scores are ridiculous, i play almost every day

developer_response.body: Shot78, thanks for writing a review! We're excited you play almost every day and are thankful for appreciating the atmosphere of the game, its graphics, and its relaxing pace!

reviews.review_description: I clicked both joysticks looking for an options menu and I got a scroll to pop up with a bunch of what looks to be code. I wish that I could have a setting to just use one of the two trigger OR grip to throw. I need to have a good grip on the controller and I can't do that if both buttons grab the disc

developer_response.body: Edwardo, thank you for pointing that out. It will be fixed in the upcoming patch. As for the controls, I will ask the devs on your behalf and see, whether we could do something about it. If you have more suggestions for the game, feel free to join our new discord: https://discord.gg/xgWMhBDK4e

reviews.review_description:
I read some of the reviews and could not believe some of the low scores. This game does require some practice but you can use the auto aim feature by hitting the A button. Also spend time in the Dojo picking off targets and I got pretty good at it

This game does require strategy. You can cut the amount of throws by taking shortcuts.

Test out both arms. I was surprised by the fact I could throw the disc better with my left hand. 

The graphics are beautiful and the game plays very smoothly but you need to practice. 

There is a really good you tube video review of the Oculus quest version of this game and it shows the multiplayer game and it gives a lot of good advice on how to play.

This game is a gem.

developer_response.body: Drseverin777, thank you for your review and so many kind words. We’re super happy you like the game since we poured our hearts into it. We intend to develop it further so stay tuned for future updates (with the first one coming very soon)!

reviews.review_title: Went In Skeptical - Came Out A BIG Fan!
reviews.review_description:
For gameplay and first impressions check out https://YouTube.com/vrdynamite and for the official review and Dynamite Score visit https://vrdynamite.com

I went into this game thinking it wouldn't be a game for me but when I left it after an hour of playing - I couldn't wait to jump back in!

I'm not an avid golfer and have never got into frisbee, two things you'd think would be essential to like this game...

Yet, the terrific game mechanics combined with the awe-inspiring level design had me enjoying every moment. They added an optional assist mode that made it easy and forgiving for us beginners - While really locking in the physics for more expert enthusiasts out there.

I was kinda blown away by all the levels available to play here on day one and glad to see lots of room for expansions that could be added down the road.

I found myself playing this over other mini golf games and enjoyed that you play non-stop at your own pace. It's not turn-by-turn based, it's a free-for-all mode that lets you play on without having to wait for the other players to make their tosses.

That combined with multiple shortcuts (some hidden) along with secret collectibles really adds to the discovery and replayability of this game.

I think you'll be surprised with how much you enjoy this one!

developer_response.body: VR-Dynamite, thanks for your review and kind words!

reviews.review_title: Don't be fooled by fake paid reviews...
reviews.review_description: I was so excited for this game and expected it to be a lot of fun, but there is almost ZERO control over your throws. I spent a while in the dojo thinking it was just me, but after a few experiments I realized that how you throw or release doesn't matter because the game can't properly read any of it. I actually took the time to carefully throw the disc lightly and with the same release a couple dozen times and it went a different way almost every time so there is no consistency AT ALL. I get  better throw and release control on Wii Sports Frisbee Golf than on this dumpster fire.

developer_response.body:
Foxshinobi13, we’re sorry you feel that way.

EDIT: It might be hard to believe, but we didn't give up on winning you over. Just recently we updated the throwing physics. We hope that you could give Disc Ninja another go!

reviews.review_description: Hey developers this game was bought accidentally is it possible if I could get a re fund I don’t really play this type of games
Really good game enjoy playing it have to try multiplayer

developer_response.body: hairyyeti1960, thanks for leaving your review. We're glad that you like the game. Good luck and have fun!

reviews.review_description: I love this game, the graphics are just amazing! The way of menu selection - by hitting a gong is so much fun! I also appreciate that in every map, there are multiple paths you can take to get to the finish. This makes multiplayer gaming much more interesting :)

developer_response.body: CerealChiller, we're very happy you like the game - thank you for your kind words!

reviews.review_description:
This game is great, you can really see, that the developers put a lot of effort into it and the attention to detail is incredible! I especially like the interactive menus, it really improves immersion.

One request for the developers - could you please add on/off switch for music when golfing? The music from the menus is really awesome and I would love to listen to it while playing with friends :)

Have a nice day :)

developer_response.body: Engorged, thank you for your kind words. Your request has been noted and submitted to the dev team. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: Everytime I play and want to leave I cannot get out. There is no clear exit button to leave and have to shut oculus down to do it.

developer_response.body: SoulCatch3r, thank you for bringing this to our attention. The game should be easy to exit via the right Oculus button (located slightly below the right joystick). We're gonna make sure that this is not an issue with the game itself.

reviews.review_description:
The caricature "accent" for the ninja in the tutorial is, frankly, unacceptable in 2021 and entirely unnecessary. It turned me off the game completely. 

I even left the game for a few hours and tried the tutorial again, thinking maybe it wasn't that bad.

It's that bad.

I agree with the other reviewer who said they went too heavy on the "Ninja" theme, making the game feel almost like a parody. There also doesn't seem to be a way to select a gender for your avatar; I guess they expect an all-male playing audience.

That aside, the gameplay is, at least for me, dull. The scenery is pretty, but essentially you're moving through it a little bit at a time, as far as you can throw.

In my case, not far. So it was throw, move a little, throw move a little. By the time I finished trying the second time, my wrist hurt. I didn't see any way to explore or wander. You only moved by following your disc.

I'll be getting a refund.

For the developers: You should change the "voice acting" for the tutorial ASAP. And consider some diversity in your office because this game never should have been released with that accent. It's shocking no one realized it.

developer_response.body: Dawn.Monkey.574, we’re sorry you feel that way. Thanks for your feedback.

reviews.review_title: Great Physics and stop getting triggered
reviews.review_description: If this game really offends you because they have a fake Japanese accent at the beginning you should go protest at an anti Trump rally instead and stop giving 1 star reviews because you are triggered and need to go to your safe zone. The physics are great and as a long time disc golfer this is pretty accurate to the real thing. Definitely improves accuracy.

developer_response.body: GandalfGrey, thank you for your kind words towards the game. Getting the physics right wasn’t an easy task, and we’re proud that you find it to be accurate.

reviews.review_description: amazing graphcs intriguing game amazing gameplay and thrilling sights definitely recommend

developer_response.body: Turduken, thanks for the awesome review!

reviews.review_title: Excellent fun ... but needs some fixes
reviews.review_description:
Love the game ... the atmosphere is wonderful. But ...

1.  the audio is AWFUL!!! And it's not just my headset. The audio is scratchy and overdriven for all of us. 
2.  connecting up through multiplayer with specific friends is clunky AF
3.  you really need to give us a way to move the 'ghost sphere' down and out of the way for seated play
4.  throwing your disc to 'vote' on your courses is ridiculous and mostly turns into some random nonsense ... just give us a button to push. Everything doesn't have to be so 'cool'.

With all that ... we LOVE the game!!!! Just bring on those 'bug fixes' quick, won't you please?

developer_response.body: Cbmosscraig, we’re very glad you like the game. Thanks for the feedback. We intend to release a patch very soon, which will address the issues you mentioned.

reviews.review_description: Didn't enjoy this. Physics seem off. Doesn't seem to have had much investment. I'll gladly change my review if they update the game.

reviews.review_title: Concept there, work to be done
reviews.review_description:
Overall, the game looks great with a good concept right from the beginning.  The throwing mechanic is nice with the shot assist.  You can also throw on your own to play around with hand, wrist, and arm movements to manipulate the disc further.  This does not happen right away and takes some practice.

Multiplayer is so far a letdown.  You wait several minutes in a room and no one will show up.  Part of that is lack of users I would imagine.  The microphone volume is way to loud!!

Lastly, the game could use free movement instead of only teleport.  If you are the first one to the end of the course you are stuck until others finish or time runs out.  I would be great to move or fly around the course to see others finish the round.

Give this game a shot, all the components are here, it just needs some refining with updates that hopefully come out soon!

developer_response.body:
Nrdblaze, thank you for your review! We’re happy you enjoy our throwing mechanics. We intended them to be easy to learn but hard to master, and it’s been a wonderful experience to notice how our initial testers got better at the game over time.

We do have an update planned with Quality-of-Life improvements (and a new game mode on top of that), but that’s just a sign of things to come! We will be adding content to the game for sure!

Thanks again, and good luck with the throws!

reviews.review_description: Played for the first time yesterday with three other people. We all thought it was great fun!!  Not difficult to meet up with your own people and it’s nice that you can all play at once. Also nice that when there’s one last person struggling to finish a course, there is a time limit!  Nice for those who are waiting as well as the one getting frustrated.    I do play disc golf and felt like the motion was true for angle and release, but you can’t rotate your body for more power.   Love the map that not only lets you see the course, but see where everyone is on the course.  We will be playing a lot more of this!!

developer_response.body: ReBeccaM58, thank you for your feedback. We’re enthusiastic that you and your friend have great fun. We aim to introduce a first post-release update very soon that will include many Quality-of-Life improvements.

reviews.review_description:
Why couldn't it be just like frisbee golf??

A couple 18-hole courses with frisbee golf style gameplay?

Maybe it's just because it isn't what I was expecting/hoping for, but I do NOT like this game.

developer_response.body:
Virtual Savage, we’re sorry you feel that way. To answer your question – it’s because this is our unique spin on frisbee golf. One you won’t find anywhere else – not a simulator per se but reimagining that operates within a similar framework!

EDIT: We recently updated the physics to make it a lot more like the real thing. Furthermore, we intend to add a huge map with an 18-hole course in the near future. Would you mind trying us out once more?
